guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell height="1100" width="20" x="515" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache_col" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="980" width="20" x="730" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn_col" parent="1" y="1030" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web_head" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Web" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="70" x="70" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="queue_head" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Queue" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="70" x="260" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agg_head" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Aggregator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="100" x="475" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache_head" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Local Cache" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="100" x="690" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn_head" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Connector" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="90" x="900" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mongo_head" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="MongoDB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="90" x="1095" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web_life" parent="1" style="shape=line;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1160" width="1" x="105" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="queue_life" parent="1" style="shape=line;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1160" width="1" x="295" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agg_life" parent="1" style="shape=line;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1160" width="1" x="525" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cache_life" parent="1" style="shape=line;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1160" width="1" x="740" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn_life" parent="1" style="shape=line;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1160" width="1" x="945" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mongo_life" parent="1" style="shape=line;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1160" width="1" x="1140" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;loopDirection=0;" value="1. Open page / request data"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="105" y="210" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="170" y="210" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="2. Enqueue request (async)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="105" y="280" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="295" y="280" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="3. Queue pickup (async)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="295" y="340" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="525" y="340" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;" value="4. Check local cache"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="525" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="740" y="400" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alt" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;startSize=28;" value="alt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="760" width="1170" x="35" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alt_div" parent="1" style="shape=line;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1" width="1130" x="55" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alt_yes" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="[Cache hit]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="55" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alt_no" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="[Cache miss]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="55" y="825" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m5" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="5. Return cached data"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="740" y="570" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="525" y="570" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m6" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="6. Return result"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="525" y="640" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="105" y="640" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m8" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="5. Cache miss"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="740" y="900" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="525" y="900" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m9" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="6. Enqueue load request (async)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="525" y="960" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="295" y="960" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m10" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="7. Queue pickup (async)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="295" y="1020" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="945" y="1020" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m11" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;" value="8. Load data from MongoDB"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="945" y="1080" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1140" y="1080" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m12" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="9. Return loaded data"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1140" y="1140" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="945" y="1140" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m13" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="10. Enqueue loaded result (async)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="945" y="1200" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="295" y="1200" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m14" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="11. Queue pickup (async)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="295" y="1260" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="525" y="1260" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m15" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;" value="12. Update local cache"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="525" y="1320" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="740" y="1320" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m16" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="13. Return result"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="525" y="1380" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="105" y="1380" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
